artPrompt: A blank folded summons strikes a portly mayor mid-gesture, his triumphant raised arm faltering as cold cyan light yanks him backward into a dissolving haze, his polished shoe lifting off a beige rotunda floor. Towering municipal pillars and filing stacks loom in deep perspective behind. Dramatic film-still moment of public humiliation at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Subpoena the Mayor
text: Return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. If it was a Mayor, an incumbent, or otherwise running for office, also draw a card and they skip their next upkeep "to attend the hearing."
flavorText: Served. Right in the middle of his victory speech.

extras.interaction: punishes Mayors/incumbents from the rival deck
